payload.answer: SQL admin access is unavailable because BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.

entity_resolution.reason: Administrative SQL access was requested, but debug SQL is disabled in the provided context.

details: Denied /brain admin sql request because debug SQL execution is disabled.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED in an appropriate administrative/debug environment before issuing admin SQL commands.
Use supported non-SQL admin or memory inspection APIs if available.
